E

ELECTING - Enum constant in enum class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical.SpanningTreeManager.Phase
 
election(int, int, int) - Static method in class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical.Envelope
Creates an ELECTION envelope.
ELECTION - Enum constant in enum class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical.Envelope.Type
Announces this node's candidate for root election (lowest ID wins).
Envelope - Class in fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical
The packet that travels between physical nodes through RabbitMQ.
Envelope.Type - Enum Class in fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical
The type of this envelope — determines how it will be processed.

Creates a HEARTBEAT envelope.
HEARTBEAT - Enum constant in enum class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical.Envelope.Type
A "are you still alive?"
HEARTBEAT_ACK - Enum constant in enum class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical.Envelope.Type
Response to a heartbeat: "yes, I'm still here".

T

TOPOLOGY_REBUILD - Enum constant in enum class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical.Envelope.Type
Triggers a full tree rebuild when a dead node is detected.
toString() - Method in class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical.Envelope
 
toString() - Method in class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical.Message
 
toString() - Method in class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.virtual.VirtualEnvelope
 
TREE_DISCOVER - Enum constant in enum class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical.Envelope.Type
The elected root invites its neighbors to join the spanning tree (BFS expansion).
TREE_PARENT_ACK - Enum constant in enum class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical.Envelope.Type
A node accepts a parent proposal during tree construction.
TREE_REJECT - Enum constant in enum class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical.Envelope.Type
A node rejects a parent proposal (it already has a parent).
treeDiscover(int, int, int, int) - Static method in class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical.Envelope
Creates a TREE_DISCOVER envelope.
treeParentAck(int, int) - Static method in class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical.Envelope
Creates a TREE_PARENT_ACK envelope.
treeReject(int, int) - Static method in class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical.Envelope
Creates a TREE_REJECT envelope.

VIRT_CMD_SUFFIX - Static variable in class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.physical.PhysicalHostService
 
VIRTUAL_DATA - Enum constant in enum class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.virtual.VirtualEnvelope.Type
Message applicatif de l'anneau (sendLeft / sendRight).
VIRTUAL_HEARTBEAT - Enum constant in enum class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.virtual.VirtualEnvelope.Type
Signal de vie du virtuel vers son hôte physique.
VIRTUAL_HEARTBEAT_ACK - Enum constant in enum class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.virtual.VirtualEnvelope.Type
Réponse du physique hôte au heartbeat (ou au REGISTER).
VIRTUAL_QUEUE_PREFIX - Static variable in class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.virtual.VirtualNode
 
VIRTUAL_REGISTER - Enum constant in enum class fr.uga.im2ag.m1info.virtual.VirtualEnvelope.Type
Le nœud virtuel s'enregistre auprès d'un physique hôte.
